arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Lyon hero turns Andre Onana's words against him as Ruben Amorim hails star
arts.sum: Andre Onana made two costly errors in Manchester United's 2-2 draw with Lyon and Rayan Cherki, who scored their late equaliser, has rubbed salt in the goalkeeper's wounds

arts.ttl: Preview: Auxerre vs. Lyon - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Auxerre and Lyon, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
